meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Scale Your Freelance SaaS Development
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app limitations. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship enterprise-grade SaaS apps at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: Stop building from scratch. The Antigravity project template provides a battle-tested architecture that abstracts boilerplate, allowing you to focus on unique business logic. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate the heavy lifting, enabling you to deliver production-ready, scalable features in hours rather than weeks.
content.intro:
You’re staring at the same boilerplate code for the tenth time this month, feeling the crushing weight of 'tutorial hell' while your client's deadline ticks away. Most freelancers get stuck here, trapped in a cycle of basic CRUD apps that offer no real value and even less profit. You aren't paid to write repetitive boilerplate; you're paid to solve high-value problems.

It’s time to move beyond the basics. The Antigravity project template is the force multiplier you’ve been missing, designed specifically for rapid SaaS deployment. We’re going to pair this with Claude Code to automate the architecture, turning you from a code-monkey into a high-leverage technical architect who delivers elite results on every single project.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Clone the base template to establish a robust, production-ready directory structure that includes pre-configured CI/CD and authentication flows.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity SaaS template with Supabase auth and Stripe integration enabled.

steps.title: Define Domain Models with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to introspect your database schema and auto-generate the necessary type-safe interfaces, ensuring data integrity across the stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate TypeScript interfaces for a multi-tenant SaaS application based on the existing database schema.

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Leverage Antigravity's component library to rapidly build out the dashboard UI without writing custom CSS or layout logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a responsive user dashboard page with sidebar navigation and data table integration using Antigravity UI components.

steps.title: Configure Intelligent API Routes
steps.description: Create high-performance API endpoints that handle complex business logic while maintaining the strict security standards of the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure API route for processing user subscriptions that handles webhooks and database updates.

steps.title: Optimize for Production Deployment
steps.description: Run the final production-ready audit to ensure your build meets performance benchmarks and security requirements before client handoff.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a production readiness check and optimize the build configuration for Vercel deployment.

pro_tips: Always use the 'shadow-mode' in Claude Code to review proposed architectural changes before applying them to your production branch.
Customize the Antigravity base template with your own custom hooks to reduce repetitive logic by 40% across all client projects.
Leverage the built-in Antigravity observability tools to track API latency in real-time without adding external heavy dependencies.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for every new feature immediately after scaffolding to maintain a high code-coverage standard.
Maintain a private 'snippets' repository that you can inject into Antigravity via Claude Code to standardize your unique coding style.
content.next_steps: Once your project is deployed, implement custom analytics and set up automated error monitoring to offer your clients an ongoing maintenance retainer.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the boilerplate and start shipping value. By mastering the Antigravity workflow, you position yourself as a premium developer who delivers results faster than the competition. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
